title: BEM-851 validate protocol
objective:
Run script:
"""
sep='\n'
for d in ['governance/state','governance/reports','governance/tasks/pending','governance/handoff','governance/transport']:
    Path(d).mkdir(parents=True,exist_ok=True)
created='2026-05-24 | 14:00 (UTC+3)'
def read(p):
    p=Path(p)
    return p.read_text(errors='ignore') if p.exists() else ''
proto=Path('governance/protocols/BEM850_AGREED_MULTI_AGENT_PROTOCOL.md')
txt=read(proto)
checks=[
 {'name':'protocol_exists','pass':proto.exists()},
 {'name':'has_source','pass':'Source:' in txt},
 {'name':'has_decision','pass':'Decision:' in txt or 'DECISION:' in txt},
 {'name':'not_empty','pass':len(txt.strip())>200},
]
failed=[c for c in checks if not c['pass']]
status='protocol_draft_validated' if not failed else 'protocol_draft_incomplete'
next_action='extract implementation roadmap from protocol and continue with first concrete patch' if not failed else 'repair protocol extraction from Claude response'
state={'bem':'BEM-851','status':status,'protocol':str(proto),'checks':checks,'failed':failed,'next_action':next_action,'created_at':created}
Path('governance/state/bem851_validate_protocol_and_next_step.json').write_text(json.dumps(state,indent=2,ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
Path('governance/reports/bem851_validate_protocol_and_next_step.md').write_text('# BEM-851 | Validate Protocol And Next Step | '+status+sep+sep+json.dumps(state,ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
Path('governance/tasks/pending/bem851_next.md').write_text('Next: '+next_action+sep+'Operator relay forbidden. Report does not stop development.'+sep)
Path('governance/handoff/GPT_NEXT_ACTION.md').write_text('# GPT NEXT ACTION | BEM-851'+sep+sep+'Status: '+status+sep+'Next: '+next_action+sep)
with Path('governance/transport/results.jsonl').open('a',encoding='utf-8') as h: h.write(json.dumps(state,ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
changed_files.extend(['governance/state/bem851_validate_protocol_and_next_step.json','governance/reports/bem851_validate_protocol_and_next_step.md','governance/tasks/pending/bem851_next.md','governance/handoff/GPT_NEXT_ACTION.md','governance/transport/results.jsonl'])
ops_applied.append('Validated BEM850 protocol draft created from real Claude response and selected next implementation step')
"""
No issue comments.
